rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" is best read here through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Tower (19) shows where things already stand: you may need stronger standards and boundaries. Here, Tower emphasizes distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood. At the pivot, Present places Lily (30) at the center, where maturity and principled calm support the path matters most. Lily colors your calling through steady ethics stabilize long-term decisions, and the need to pair composure with clear intent. Coffin (8) in Future suggests release an outdated pattern gracefully, once the middle-card pressure has been worked with directly. Coffin colors your calling through the part of the old path that has already finished, and the rest that is needed before anything genuinely new can take root. Tower (19) with Lily (30) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of institution and maturity, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to passive avoidance of necessary action. Lily (30) shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Here, Lily emphasizes steady ethics stabilize long-term decisions, with maturity, peace, and ethics close to the surface. Tower (19) with Lily (30) keep emphasizing a blend of institution and maturity, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to passive avoidance of necessary action. Pair composure with clear intent so Coffin (8) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
